edges.evidence_quote: Massino turned to Colombo crime family boss Carmine Persico and Gambino crime family boss Paul Castellano for advice; they told him to act immediately.
edges.context: Bonanno capo Massino sought advice from Colombo boss Persico, indicating cooperation.

edges.evidence_quote: The lot was a Gambino mob graveyard; Gambino capo John Gotti arranged for his men to bury the bodies there as a favor to Massino.
edges.context: Gambino family provided burial services for Bonanno family, indicating cooperation.
